message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
!option handwritten true

skinparam backgroundColor #F0EDE4
skinparam sequenceArrowColor #00BFFF
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #00BFFF
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBackgroundColor #00BFFF
skinparam sequenceParticipantBackgroundColor #00AAFF
skinparam sequenceParticipantFontColor white
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderColor #00AAFF
skinparam actorBorderColor #00BFFF
skinparam actorFontColor #00BFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left

actor developer

participant DEV
participant TEST
participant MASTER
participant HOTFIX

developer -> TEST : **1** 增量换包到TEST
TEST -> MASTER : **2** 测试通过后，基于TEST打tag
TEST -> MASTER : **3** check release分支
TEST -> MASTER : **4** 将release分支合并到MASTER
MASTER -> HOTFIX : **5** ，线上紧急问题，基于MASTER check HOTFIX分支
MASTER -> HOTFIX : **6** ，开发基于HOTFIX分支check本地分支修复问题
MASTER -> HOTFIX : **7** 修复完成后合回HOTFIX分支
MASTER -> HOTFIX : **8** 用CMP工具基于HOTFIX打包换到测试环境进行验证
HOTFIX -> MASTER : **9** 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回MASTER
HOTFIX -> TEST : **10** 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回TEST
HOTFIX -> developer : **11** 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回DEV

@enduml
```
